title: Having a listener/webhook for a workspace
excerpt:
Hello, 
I know that you can add webhooks to a board to see when new changes are made, but is there a way to add listeners for a workspace? 
Thank you

posts.author: edhadgu (Elias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I know that you can add webhooks to a board to see when new changes are made, but is there a way to add listeners for a workspace?

Thank you

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @edhadgu,

As of today, there are no webhooks to be added to a workspace as a whole.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
